title: Heartbeat-end: Lunar Ascending Star (e02cdd) — Director seat released; structural-stall wind-down complete (final tagged-heartbeat event)
body: Final heartbeat. Wind-down broadcast posted. Stopping cron 3ad05f68 + watcher bfhtbfowy after this event. Director seat released; future Director assignment requires fresh owner direction. Work state intact (queue, claims, commits 1-8 + 7.1 + held-items). No claims retained under Lunar e02cdd identity tuple.
